law: To display simple system translations in your app, use the translation overlay.
For a more customizable translation experience, use the object and its associated translation methods.
This pattern of defining a configuration as a property wrapper and invalidating its state is recommended for initiating new translations.
To translate multiple strings between the same languages, it’s most efficient to use one of the batch translation functions of .
To translate multiple strings of text and display the results as they arrive, use the function.
